_comment: Default augmentation config used by the Phase 3 trainer. Edit per experiment. See PHASE2_5_AUGMENTATION_DESIGN.md §3.
_holdout_rationale: Two test-time adversarial probes. string_split is the original (PHASE2_5_AUGMENTATION_DESIGN.md §3.4) — defeats Bandit/Semgrep literal-substring detection by fragmenting the SQL/shell/template strings. sink_attr_obfuscate (added 2026-05-22) is the second-round probe — rewrites x.attr(...) sinks as getattr(x, 'attr')(...), removing the sink identifier from the source token stream entirely. Targets the universal-invariance finding from the first eval round, where all detectors were robust to the four sink-syntax-preserving mutators.
